## Description

Please include a summary of the changes and the problem/feature being addressed. Highlight any key architectural decisions or non-obvious code paths.

Fixes #(issue_number)

---

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change fixing an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change adding functionality)
- [ ] UI / Styling enhancement (design polish, responsive UI)
- [ ] Performance optimization (caching, skeleton loading, SWR)
- [ ] Documentation update

---

## Target Component & UI Mode

- [ ] Mobile UI (`src/pages-mobile/`)
- [ ] Desktop UI (`src/pages-desktop/`)
- [ ] Core / Shared Utility / Tauri Hooks (`src/lib/`, `src/hooks/`)

---

## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows Deskly's design system & global Shadcn color rules.
- [ ] I have run `npx tsc --noEmit` and confirmed 0 compilation errors.
- [ ] I have tested offline caching / 15s timeout fallbacks if API endpoints were touched.
- [ ] No hardcoded hex colors or intrusive animations were added.
- [ ] I have updated relevant documentation if needed.

---

## Screenshots / Visual Proof (if applicable)

*Add screenshots or GIF demonstrations comparing before & after UI states.*
